debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
inst✝³ : LinearOrder ι
E : Type u_4
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : InfSet ι
inst✝ : Bot ι
X : ι → Ω → E
t : ι
K : ℝ
ω : Ω
⊢ ⨆ s, ⨆ (_ : s ≤ t), ‖stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω‖ ≤
    K +
      {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ ↑t}.indicator
        (fun ω => ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω

by

      linarith [norm_nonneg (X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω).untopA ω)]

  · simp only [norm_zero]
    linarith [norm_nonneg (stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω)]

by
  by_cases h : hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ ↑t
  · rw [Set.indicator_of_mem h]
    apply iSup₂_le
    intro s hs
    simp only [stoppedProcess]
    by_cases hK : 0 ≤ K
    · calc ‖X (min ↑s (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω)).untopA ω‖ 
          ≤ K + ‖X (min ↑s (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω)).untopA ω‖ := 
            le_add_of_nonneg_left hK
        _ ≤ K + ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖ := by
            apply add_le_add_left
            simp only [stoppedValue]
            apply norm_le_norm_of_abs_le_abs
            rw [abs_norm, abs_norm]
            sorry
    · sorry
  · rw [Set.indicator_of_not_mem h]
    apply iSup₂_le
    intro s hs
    simp only [stoppedProcess]
    sorry
